H3900.strongs_def: {(for man or beast), especially bread, or grain (for making it)}

H3902.derivation: from H3899 (לֶחֶם); foodful; (or perhaps erroneous transcription) for H1022 (בֵּית הַלַּחְמִי)
H3902.strongs_def: Lachmi, an Israelite; or rather probably a brief form

H3903.derivation: probably by erroneous transcription for לַחְמָם; from H3899 (לֶחֶם); food-like;
H3903.strongs_def: Lachmam or Lachmas, a place in Palestine

H3904.derivation: (Aramaic) from an unused root of uncertain meaning;

H3905.strongs_def: properly, to press, i.e. (figuratively) to distress
H3905.kjv_def: afflict, crush, force, hold fast, oppress(-or), thrust self.
H3905.usage: oppress(13x), afflict(1x), crushed(1x), fast(1x), forced(1x), oppressors(1x), thrust(1x)

H3907.strongs_def: to whisper; by implication, to mumble aspell (as a magician)

H3908.strongs_def: properly, a whisper, i.e. by implication, (in a good sense) a private prayer, (in a bad one) an incantation; concretely, an amulet

H3909.derivation: a form of H3814 (לָאט) or else participle from H3874 (לוּט);
H3909.strongs_def: properly, covered, i.e. secret; by implication, incantation; also secrecy or (adverb) covertly

H3910.strongs_def: a gum (from its sticky nature), probably ladanum

H3911.derivation: from an unused root meaning to hide;
H3911.strongs_def: a kind of lizard (from its covert habits)

H3912.derivation: masculine plural of passive participle of H3913 (לָטַשׁ); hammered (i.e. oppressed) ones;

H3913.strongs_def: properly, to hammer out (an edge), i.e. to sharpen

H3915.derivation: or (Isaiah 21:11) לֵיל; also לַיְלָה; from the same as H3883 (לוּל);
H3915.strongs_def: properly, a twist (away of the light), i.e. night; figuratively, adversity

H3918.derivation: from H3888 (לוּשׁ) in the sense of crushing;

H3919.strongs_def: Laish, the name of two places in Palestine
H3919.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H3920.strongs_def: to catch (in a net, trap or pit); generally, to capture or occupy; also to choose (by lot); figuratively, to cohere
H3920.kjv_def: [idiom] at all, catch (self), be frozen, be holden, stick together, take.

H3921.strongs_def: something to capture with, i.e. a noose

H3923.derivation: from an unused root of uncertain meaning;

H3925.strongs_def: properly, to goad, i.e. (by implication) to teach (the rod being an Oriental incentive)
H3925.kjv_def: (un-) accustomed, [idiom] diligently, expert, instruct, learn, skilful, teach(-er, -ing).
H3925.usage: teach(56x), learn(22x), instruct(3x), diligently(1x), expert(1x), skilful(1x), teachers(1x)

H3926.derivation: a prolonged and separable form of the prepositional prefix;

H3927.derivation: or לְמוֹאֵל; from H3926 (לְמוֹ) and H410 (אֵל); (belonging) to God;
H3927.strongs_def: Lemuel or Lemoel, a symbolic name of Solomon

H3929.derivation: from an unused root of uncertain meaning;
H3929.strongs_def: Lemek, the name of two antediluvian patriarchs

H3932.strongs_def: to deride; by implication (as if imitating a foreigner) to speak unintelligibly
H3932.kjv_def: have in derision, laugh (to scorn), mock (on), stammering.

H3935.derivation: from an unused root of uncertain meaning;

H3936.strongs_def: Ladan, the name of two Israelites

H3937.strongs_def: to speak in a foreign tongue

H3938.strongs_def: to swallow greedily; causatively, to feed

H3939.derivation: from an unused root supposed to mean to curse;
H3939.strongs_def: wormwood (regarded as poisonous, and therefore accursed)

H3940.derivation: or לַפִּד; from an unused root probably meaning to shine;
H3940.usage: lamp(7x), firebrand(2x), torch(2x), brand(1x), lightning(1x), burning(1x)

H3942.derivation: from the prepositional prefix (to or for) and H6440 (פָּנִים);

H3943.strongs_def: properly, to bend, i.e. (by implication) to clasp; also (reflexively) to turn around or aside

H3946.derivation: from an unused root thought to mean to stop up by a barricade; perhaps fortification;

H3947.strongs_def: to take (in the widest variety of applications)
H3947.kjv_def: accept, bring, buy, carry away, drawn, fetch, get, infold, [idiom] many, mingle, place, receive(-ing), reserve, seize, send for, take (away, -ing, up), use, win.
H3947.usage: take(747x), receive(61x), fetch(31x), bring(25x), get(6x), married(4x), buy(3x)

H3948.strongs_def: properly, something received, i.e. (mentally) instruction (whether on the part of the teacher or hearer); also (in an active and sinister sense) inveiglement

H3950.strongs_def: properly, to pick up, i.e. (generally) to gather; specifically, to glean

H3955.derivation: from an unused root of uncertain meaning; apparently juice, i.e.
H3955.strongs_def: (figuratively) vigor; also a sweet or fat cake

H3956.derivation: or לָשֹׁן; also (in plural) feminine לְשֹׁנָה; from H3960 (לָשַׁן);
H3956.strongs_def: the tongue (of man or animals), used literally (as the instrument of licking, eating, or speech), and figuratively (speech, an ingot, a fork of flame, a cove of water)
H3956.kjv_def: [phrase] babbler, bay, [phrase] evil speaker, language, talker, tongue, wedge.
H3956.usage: tongue(98x), language(10x), bay(3x), wedge(2x), babbler(1x), flame(1x), talkers(1x)

H3957.derivation: from an unused root of uncertain meaning;
H3957.strongs_def: a room in a building (whether for storage, eating, or lodging)

H3958.derivation: from an unused root of uncertain meaning;

H3960.derivation: a primitive root; properly, to lick; but used only as a denominative from H3956 (לָשׁוֹן);
H3960.strongs_def: to wag the tongue, i.e. to calumniate

H3962.derivation: from an unused root thought to mean to break through; a boiling spring;
H3962.strongs_def: Lesha, a place probably East of the Jordan

H3963.derivation: from an unused root of uncertain meaning;

H3966.strongs_def: properly, vehemence, i.e. (with or without preposition) vehemently; by implication, wholly, speedily, etc. (often with other words as an intensive or superlative; especially when repeated)
H3966.kjv_def: diligently, especially, exceeding(-ly), far, fast, good, great(-ly), [idiom] louder and louder, might(-ily, -y), (so) much, quickly, (so) sore, utterly, very ([phrase] much, sore), well.
H3966.usage: very(137x), greatly(49x), sore(23x), exceeding(18x), great(12x), exceedingly(11x), much(10x), diligently(4x), good(3x), might(2x), mightily(2x)

H3967.derivation: or מֵאיָה; properly, a primitive numeral
H3967.strongs_def: a hundred; also as a multiplicative and a fraction

H3969.derivation: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3967 (מֵאָה); properly, a primitive numeral
H3969.strongs_def: a hundred; also as a multiplicative and a fraction}

H3971.derivation: usually מוּם; as if passive participle from an unused root probably meaning
H3971.strongs_def: to stain; a blemish (physically or morally)

H3972.strongs_def: properly, a speck or point, i.e. (by implication) something; with negative, nothing
H3972.usage: nothing(9x), ought(5x), any(2x), fault(1x), harm(1x), nought(1x), somewhat(1x)

H3974.derivation: or מָאֹר; also (in plural) feminine מְאוֹרָה; or מְאֹרָה; from H215 (אוֹר);
H3974.strongs_def: properly, a luminous body or luminary, i.e. (abstractly) light (as an element); figuratively, brightness, i.e.cheerfulness; specifically, a chandelier

H3975.strongs_def: something lighted, i.e. an aperture; by implication, a crevice or hole (of a serpent)

H3976.strongs_def: (only in the dual) a pair of scales

H3977.strongs_def: {(only in the dual) a pair of scales}

H3978.strongs_def: an eatable (includ. provender, flesh and fruit)

H3979.strongs_def: something to eat with,i.e. a knife

H3984.derivation: (Aramaic) probably from a root corresponding to H579 (אָנָה) in the sense of an inclosure by sides;

H3988.kjv_def: abhor, cast away (off), contemn, despise, disdain, (become) loathe(some), melt away, refuse, reject, reprobate, [idiom] utterly, vile person.

H3992.strongs_def: to be bitter or (causatively) to embitter, i.e. be painful

H3993.kjv_def: lie in ambush, ambushment, lurking place, lying in wait.

H3995.strongs_def: a separation, i.e. (concretely) a separate place

H3996.strongs_def: an entrance (the place or the act); specifically sunset or the west; also (adverb with preposition) towards
H3996.kjv_def: by which came, as cometh, in coming, as men enter into, entering, entrance into, entry, where goeth, going down, [phrase] westward. Compare H4126 (מוֹבָא).
H3996.usage: entry(5x), come(3x), entrance(3x), enter(2x), in(2x), west(1x), westward(1x), variant(1x)

H3999.derivation: from H2986 (יָבַל) in the sense of flowing;
